attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
   APPL.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_SLS_TRX_KEY,
   APPL.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_MODE_CD,
   APPL.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT,
   APPL.BK_SALES_REP_NUM,              
   APPL.BK_SLS_TERR_ASGNMT_TYPE_CD,    
   APPL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,   
   APPL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,  
   APPL.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
   APPL.SPLIT_PCT,
   APPL.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
   APPL.EFFECTIVE_START_DTM,
   APPL.EFFECTIVE_END_DTM,
   APPL.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM,             
   APPL.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
   APPL.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
   NSCTT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG AS QUOTA_FLAG,
   APPL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
   APPL.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT,
   APPL.ACTION_CD,
   /* NFISMN_SYS IS USEFUL WHEN NET CHANGE RUNS FOR CATCHUP DATA (OR BACKDATING AND RUNNING NET CHANGE PART) */
   CASE  WHEN ( NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100  ) < (NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100) 
    THEN NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
    ELSE   NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
   END AS BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT , 
   CASE  WHEN ( NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100  ) < (NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100)
    THEN NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
    ELSE   NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
   END AS BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
   CASE  WHEN ( NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100  ) < (NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100)
    THEN (NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100)
    ELSE   ( NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100  )
   END AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
   'INSERT' AS EVENT_TYPE   
  FROM
  (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID ='Wf_WI_REV_SCA_NRT_XAAS_TV') X,
    ( SELECT BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT, BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
    FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH 
    WHERE CURRENT_DATE-1 BETWEEN FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
   ) NFISMN_SYS ,
   $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP_XAAS APPL
  /*IMPLEMENTING REF FROM ERP : JOIN WITH 3NF TO GET QUOTA_FLAG FOR CG DATA */ 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN 
  ( SELECT BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE, SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG 
   FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV  
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE   ORDER BY END_TV_DATE DESC)=1
  ) NSCTT
   ON APPL.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = NSCTT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE 
   
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFISMN  
   ON  APPL.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM BETWEEN NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
  WHERE  1=1 
  /* TO PULL INCREMENTALLY */ 
  AND APPL.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > X.LAST_EXTRACT_DATE
  AND  NOT  /* NOT TO TAKE RETRO UPDATES */
   (   APPL.EDW_CREATE_DTM <=  X.LAST_EXTRACT_DATE   /* OLD CREATED */ 
       AND EFFECTIVE_END_DTM =  '3500-01-01 00:00:00'    /* OPEN RECORD */
   )
 -- AND APPL.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT>0 /*TO FILTER OUT DEFAULT SC RECORDS*/
    AND (APPL.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT>0 OR APPL.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT<-1000000000) /*Q3FY18 SC BIG_INT CHANGE */

SELECT 
   APPL.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_SLS_TRX_KEY,
   APPL.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_MODE_CD,
   APPL.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT,
   APPL.BK_SALES_REP_NUM,              
   APPL.BK_SLS_TERR_ASGNMT_TYPE_CD,    
   APPL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,   
   APPL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,  
   APPL.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
   APPL.SPLIT_PCT,
   APPL.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
   APPL.EFFECTIVE_START_DTM,
   APPL.EFFECTIVE_END_DTM,
   APPL.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM,             
   APPL.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
   APPL.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
   APPL.QUOTA_FLAG,
   APPL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
   APPL.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT,
   APPL.ACTION_CD,
   APPL.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT , 
   APPL.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
   APPL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
   APPL.EVENT_TYPE   
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_XAAS_INCR APPL
  WHERE
  EXISTS
   (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVD  
       INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
       ON DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
	   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
       ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
       INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
       ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
    WHERE 
    NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=APPL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
	AND (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD')/* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	     OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS')) /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
		 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS')) /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
		 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS'))/*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
		 )
   )
  OR EXISTS
   (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVD  
       INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
       ON DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
	   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
       ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
       INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
       ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
    WHERE 
    NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=APPL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
	AND
     (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD')/* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	   OR ( NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS'))
	   OR ( NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS')) /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
	   OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS'))/*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	   )
   )
